body.title: pe_chain hardcodes _REPO_ROOT to ~/TheIgors — blocks worktree-based replay-old cert protocol
body.result: Shipped via commit 59909f81. _REPO_ROOT becomes _get_repo_root() function honoring IGOR_PE_CHAIN_REPO_ROOT env var, default ~/TheIgors preserved. pe_chain_debugger.start() accepts repo_root kwarg. OBSERVE logs the active root (per debugging-discipline). 6 new tests + all 159 existing pe_chain tests pass. Cert chain W-1 through W-10 unblocked.
body.description:
Cert walk W-1 (2026-04-30 21:29) discovered: pe_chain reads source files from `Path.home() / 'TheIgors'` (pe_chain.py line 638) instead of from the cwd or a configurable repo root. This means a debugger script run from a worktree at a different path silently reads the MAIN checkout's files in OBSERVE — which makes replay-old cert walks impossible.

**Walk W-1 trace:**
- Worktree at /home/akien/TheIgors-cert-walks/W1, HEAD=92749474~1 (parent of the fix)
- Ticket asked pe_chain to add 'tests/test_twm_context.py' to _PREFLIGHT_IGNORE in ops.py
- Worktree's ops.py: 0 occurrences of 'test_twm_context'
- Main's ops.py: 1 occurrence (the fix already shipped)
- pe_chain OBSERVE returned MAIN's file content (showed lines 1241-1244 with the fix present)
- HYPOTHESIZE generated an edit trying to insert the line under a comment-without-entry pattern that doesn't exist anywhere in main (it's the future-state-without-the-line, which doesn't exist now)
- IMPLEMENT correctly rejected: 'old_string not found verbatim'
- Net: cert walk failed for harness reasons, not pe_chain capability reasons (analogous to yesterday's 7B routing detour)

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/tools/pe_chain.py (line 638 _REPO_ROOT, plus probably _validate_hypothesis at line 1860 and any other path resolutions); possibly wild_igor/igor/tools/pe_chain_debugger.py (debugger entry point may need a repo_root parameter to forward).
**Design rules:** test-plan-or-why-not. Add unit test that pe_chain.OBSERVE respects an injected repo_root parameter (passed via debugger.start kwarg or env var IGOR_PE_CHAIN_REPO_ROOT).
**Scope boundary:** IN — make pe_chain path-aware via constructor/start arg, default to current ~/TheIgors when unset (preserves Igor autonomous behavior); thread it through OBSERVE, validate_hypothesis, and IMPLEMENT. OUT — refactoring all `Path.home() / 'TheIgors'` occurrences in the broader codebase; changing Igor's autonomous repo root.
**Test plan:** (1) Unit test: pe_chain_debugger.start(ticket_id=..., repo_root=Path('/tmp/fake_repo_with_test_file')) — assert OBSERVE reads from /tmp/fake_repo_with_test_file. (2) Integration test: re-run cert walk W-1 with fixed harness, assert HYPOTHESIZE old_string is found verbatim in worktree's ops.py.

**Companion to:** T-cert-debugger-env-mirror — both are silent test-rig bugs that distort cert results. Yesterday's was wrong model routing; today's is wrong file path. Pattern: cert harness must mirror Igor's runtime AND respect explicit overrides.
